Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}After combat, you may have the opportunity to {f 0 1 2}scout{f 0 1 27}. If you decide to scout the area, one of your teammates will temporarily leave your party to look for a path to the next floor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}The ally scouting ahead will also collect items and hand over anything they've collected upon rejoining the party on the next floor. Note that you will be down a party member if you choose to scout.[n]{f 1 1}
